title: The Bill Murray Stories: Life Lessons Learned from a Mythical Man
original_title: The Bill Murray Stories: Life Lessons Learned from a Mythical Man
overview: One man’s journey to find meaning in Bill Murray’s many unexpected adventures with everyday people, rare and never-before seen footage of the comedic icon participating in stories previously presumed to be urban legend.
